\section{Summary}
\small{ Recent B.E. Electronics and Communication Engineering graduate with hands on experience in RTL related activities including UART transactor development, protocol enhancements, static timing analysis, and scripting for design verification. Proven ability to develop Verilog/SystemVerilog testbenches, automate STA reports, and perform timing closure on advanced SoC designs. Seeking an RTL Design Engineer role to apply strong problem solving skills and knowledge of bus protocols (e.g., UART) and low power design. }
